_sample_provenance: Captured 2026-06-08 from scripts/00_smoke_test.py against the supplied CMC Pro API key (Basic plan).
_dev_doc_reference: §3.3 endpoint [D]; §3.9 M0 back-fill triggers fallback price source
_action_taken: PRICE_SOURCE_FALLBACK = 'binance' in config/constants.py; scripts/01_pull_data.py::pull_ohlcv_via_binance pulls daily candles from Binance public /api/v3/klines for the curated universe (BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, DOGE, AVAX, TRX, DOT, LINK, BCH, NEO, STX, UNI, TON, ATOM, LTC).
_upgrade_path: Re-run 00_smoke_test.py after upgrading to Standard or higher; the smoke test will overwrite this placeholder with a real sample and scripts/01_pull_data.py will switch to pull_ohlcv_via_cmc automatically (it inspects OHLCV_EARLIEST).

status.error_message: Your API Key subscription plan doesn't support this endpoint.
